title: Magical Flaky American Apple Pie
description: A nostalgic American dessert featuring sour apples and flaky filo pastry, cooked to perfection with binchotan-charcoal for a smoky flavor, and made FODMAP-friendly for all to enjoy.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit with the binchotan charcoal placed on the bottom rack for smoking.
In a large bowl, combine the sliced apples, lemon juice, sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt, and mix until the apples are evenly coated.
Roll out the filo pastry and brush with the beaten egg for a golden glaze.
Place the apple mixture onto one half of the pastry, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Fold the other half of the pastry over the apple mixture and press the edges to seal.
Brush the top of the pastry with the remaining egg and cut a few slits in the top for ventilation.
Place the pie on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 40-50 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
Remove the pie from the oven and let it cool for 10-15 minutes before serving.
Serve warm and enjoy the smoky flavor from the binchotan charcoal.
